titleStmt.title: SII 9.672: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 672. (A.R. No. 739 of 1919.) ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT SULUVAYI, ALUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1483, Durmati, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 15 corresponding to A.D. 1561 July 26, Saturday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya. It records that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tirumalarāja-Rāmarājaya-Mahā-arasu made a grant of a fixed sum of toll-revenue of two villages (names lost) for the service of the god Kalināthadēva at Suruḷuvāyi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśca śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1483
ya du(ṁ)rmmatisaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa śu 15 lu . śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivadēvamahārāyaru pri
thuvīrājyaṁgeIvutta yiralu śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara tiruma
larāja rāmarājayyadēva mahāarasugaḷu suruḷuvāya kallinā
thadēvara mane kke haḷiya sēna
bhōva gauḍa seṭi paṭaṇasvāmi muṁtāda sama
sta prajegaḷa Anumatadiṁda yiveraḍu grāmadalli
haṇa 1 kke voṁdu kāsina mūlavīsavanū kallināthadēva
rige samastamahānāḍugaḷu dalli samarpi
sidevū �yo kallināthadēvara mane kkepūrvadalli
�yo dēvarige saluvaṁtha mā(ṁ)nya nīrāraṁbha kāḍā
raṁbha hasaru vāṇi
Aramanege
vāgi dēvara vutsavakkaṁ Ānumatadiṁ
ge samarppaṇeyanū māḍidevu �yo dharmava Āroba
ru Āḷusidare taṁma taṁdetāyigaḷa vāraṇā
śiyalli koṁda pāpakke hōharu maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī
dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ .
dānatsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ [padaṁ .]
Digital edition of SII 9.672 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
